summary: Seodaemun hosts Yonsei and Ewha — one of Seoul's major university clusters. DPK held both subdistricts (갑 50.75, 을 57.62). Young-voter composition plus progressive academic culture anchor reliable DPK preference.

issues.label: University-youth base
issues.description: Yonsei + Ewha produce a high share of young voters; Shinchon as cultural-political hub.

issues.label: Residential + student mix
issues.description: Daytime student population overlaps with resident electorate.
